description: API to obtain the registrable domain / eTLD+1 from a domain name.

functions.name: isKnownSuffix
functions.description: Checks if the given hostname is itself a known public suffix / eTLD (i.e. in the PSL).

returns.description: True if the given hostname is itself a known eTLD.

functions.name: getKnownSuffix
functions.description: Gets the known public suffix / eTLD (i.e. in the PSL), if any, of a given hostname.

returns.description: The known eTLD of the given hostname, or null if no such known eTLD exists.

functions.name: getDomain
functions.description: Gets the eTLD+1 of a given hostname, or a variant such as IP address if the options allow.

allOf.description: Determines how the returned domain should be encoded.

allowIPAddress.description: If true, and the input hostname is an IP address, then this is returned as-is.

allowPlainSuffix.description: If true, and the input hostname is itself a known eTLD (without a preceding label) then this is returned as-is.

allowUnknownSuffix.description: If true, and the input hostname lacks a known eTLD, and is neither itself a known eTLD nor an IP address, then the returned domain consists of the penultimate two domain labels of the input.

returns.description: The eTLD+1 (or a variant such as IP address if allowed) of the given hostname, or null if no such eTLD+1 (variant) exists.

DomainEncoding.description: The available encoding types for the returned domain.
